'''''Alderaan''''' was a space [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] owned by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] as of [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].

It was named for her [[Alderaan/Legends|destroyed homeworld]]. It saw heavy use from Organa Solo after her children were kidnapped by [[Hethrir]] and she was forced to go incognito. Leia also used her yacht during the [[Almanian Uprising|Uprising at Almania]] of [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]].

{{Ship-stub}}
